description_long: This is a round, three-layer cake with a smooth, pale beige exterior and a minimalist design. The top of the cake is adorned with three pink, petal-like decorations and a single white spherical accent in the center, resembling a stylized flower. The cake layers are evenly stacked, with subtle indentations and slight textural details along the sides, suggesting a soft, spongy interior. The surface appears matte and unglazed, with no visible piping or elaborate icing work. There are no candles or writing present, and the cake is not displayed on any visible plate or stand. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on simple, elegant decoration.
description: A three-layer round cake with a smooth beige finish, topped with pink petal-like decorations and a white sphere. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible container or candles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's three layers and the pink petal decorations with a white sphere centered on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the pink petals and the central white sphere, with the cake's layers clearly visible.
description_view_2: The pink petals are seen more from the side, partially obscuring the white sphere, and the cake's smooth top is prominent.
description_view_3: The petals are more spread out and the white sphere is less visible, emphasizing the cake's layered sides.
